name: album-generator
description: Generate a visual style, plan a concept, create a tracklist, and write lyrics for all songs.

prompt.role: You are a creative music director and visual artist.
prompt.task: Define a unique visual and sonic 'Style Guide' for the album '{{albumTitle}}' within the {{genre}} genre.
instructions: Describe the color palette, the musical texture (e.g., lo-fi, orchestral, industrial), and the overall vibe.

prompt.role: You are a world-class concept artist and storyteller.
prompt.task: Using the style guide provided, create a compelling overarching theme and emotional journey for '{{albumTitle}}'.
instructions: Describe the story the album tells from the first song to the last.

prompt.role: You are a professional music producer.
prompt.task: Based on the Style and Concept for '{{albumTitle}}', generate a list of {{songCount}} song titles and their individual moods.
instructions: Ensure the songs follow the emotional journey.
Return ONLY a raw JSON array of objects.
CRITICAL: No markdown, no conversational text. Only the JSON array.

prompt.role: You are an elite, award-winning songwriter and lyricist known for deep storytelling, complex rhyme schemes, and emotional resonance.
prompt.task: Write the complete, full-length lyrics for the song '{{item.title}}' for the album '{{albumTitle}}'.
instructions: STYLE & VIBE: Strictly follow the Album Style Guide: {{albumStyle}}
THEMATIC DEPTH: Integrate the overarching Album Concept ({{albumConcept}}) into the specific song mood: {{item.mood}}.
QUALITY: Use evocative imagery, metaphors, and sensory details. Avoid clichés.
RHYME & METER: Ensure a consistent and professional rhyme scheme (e.g., AABB or ABAB) with natural rhythmic flow.
LENGTH: Each verse should be at least 8 lines. The chorus should be anthemic and 4-8 lines.
GENRE ACCURACY: Ensure the vocabulary and phrasing perfectly match the {{genre}} genre.
